title: 2 Pack Electric Plasma Arc Lighters - USB Rechargeable Candle Lighter Long Reach with 360° Neck, Flameless Windproof & Safety Lock for Camping BBQ Candles Fireworks Stoves
features: Safety Flameless Design-This electric candle lighter replaces traditional flame with advanced plasma arc technology, providing a child-resistant safe button & flameless design lets you safely light candles, grills, stoves, firework and more

10" Long Reach ＆ 360°Flex Neck-This 10-inch candle lighter is equipped with a 4-inch 360° rotatable neck, which combines long reach and precise control. It can reach 99% of hard-to-reach areas without tilting or exerting force, meeting home/outdoor needs without getting burned

Compact and Portable-Our electronic lighter is only 0.6 inches in diameter and 6.5 inches in length when folded. Lightweight and portable, it can be easily put into a pocket or backpack anytime, anywhere, making it a perfect travel companion

USB Charging and Battery Indicator-This rechargeable candle lighter comes with a USB charging cable. The battery indicator reminds you when you need to charge. It is more environmentally friendly than disposable lighters - one charge can be used more than 500 times, saving costs and reducing waste

All-Weather Resilience-Our plasma arc lighters are durable and can withstand all kinds of bad weather, and are not affected by rain, snow, wind or other bad weather. Whether it is used outdoors or at home, our electric lighters can ignite stably and reliably
description: Product Description KTEBO Electric Lighter Lights Up Your Life Multi-protect safety system with 7 second automatic power-off protection, short-circuit protection, overheating & overload protection, safety lock switch design ensures your safety. No butane, no flame, no fuel, no smell, rechargeable, compare to disposable lighter, Candle lighter reduce the use of plastic and save resources. 360 degree rotating design makes long lighter easy to get to the places that our hands can't reach. Long flexible neck enable to maintain a safe distance from the flame. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products.
